input.existing_structure: separate corner rails and six independent panels

reasoning.rule: rail integration is allowed only if datum inspection remains possible
reasoning.serviceability_check: panel removal and rail straightness inspection are preserved

output.proposal: single rail-frame spine with inspection windows

input.problem: many small spacers increase assembly time

reasoning.rule: standoffs may become a ladder if board slide path remains clear
reasoning.serviceability_check: one panel removal exposes board stack

output.proposal: integrated board shelf and standoff ladder

input.problem: clips are easy to lose and slow to install

reasoning.rule: wire management can integrate into open channel, not hidden conduit
reasoning.serviceability_check: dummy wiring can be inspected without disassembly

output.proposal: open cable channel on board ladder

input.existing_structure: antenna hinge dummy attached to panel
input.problem: external feature breaks before main frame

reasoning.rule: fragile exposed features stay separate
reasoning.serviceability_check: hinge can be replaced from outside

output.proposal: keep antenna hinge dummy pair as sacrificial parts
verification: remove hinge dummy without opening frame

input.problem: too many screws and repeated panel squaring
input.constraint: at least two access faces required

reasoning.rule: panel count may reduce if three or more service access points remain
reasoning.serviceability_check: left/right panels and board path remain accessible

output.proposal: two removable service panels plus fixed frame faces
verification: remove one panel and extract board dummy

input.existing_structure: flat side panel with no labels
input.problem: operator cannot identify service side quickly

reasoning.rule: engraving can add service clarity without assembly cost
reasoning.serviceability_check: label visible before panel removal

output.proposal: engraved SERVICE PANEL text and access arrows

reasoning.rule: hidden conduit is bad for serviceability in v1 mockup
reasoning.serviceability_check: wire path must be visible through panel opening

output.proposal: use open channel instead of enclosed conduit
verification: inspect full cable path with panel removed

input.problem: few parts but no internal access

reasoning.rule: part count reduction fails when service access is blocked
reasoning.serviceability_check: board cannot be removed

output.proposal: reject monolithic closed shell; restore removable panels
verification: mark as fail if board access blocked

input.existing_structure: separate end caps and side rails

reasoning.rule: end cap rim may integrate with rail spine if top access remains open
reasoning.serviceability_check: top hinge dummy remains externally replaceable

output.proposal: integrate fixed end rim into spine but keep external hinge dummy separate

input.existing_structure: board carrier screwed from two sides

reasoning.rule: service panels should expose board fasteners from one side
reasoning.serviceability_check: board dummy can slide out after removing one side panel

output.proposal: one-side board ladder extraction path
verification: remove board dummy from one side only

input.problem: long datum may warp across bed

reasoning.rule: orientation must protect datum geometry
reasoning.serviceability_check: datum ribs inspectable after print

output.proposal: print rail-frame long axis along Z with inspection windows

reasoning.rule: sliding panels should print outer face on bed or controlled face down
reasoning.serviceability_check: panel grooves engage without binding

output.proposal: print panels face-down with screw bosses up

reasoning.rule: captive bosses improve assembly without blocking access
reasoning.serviceability_check: screws removable from outside

output.proposal: integrate captive screw bosses into removable panels
reduced_steps: hold loose nut during panel install

reasoning.rule: permanent joining is rejected for replaceable internals
reasoning.serviceability_check: board cannot be extracted

output.proposal: replace glue with slide slots and service panel

reasoning.rule: replace non-service panels with fixed frame faces and inspection windows
reasoning.serviceability_check: remaining windows support inspection

output.proposal: fixed frame faces with rail datum windows

input.existing_structure: internal board ladder enclosed by frame
input.constraint: educational model should show internal logic

reasoning.rule: educational mockup benefits from visible functional paths
reasoning.serviceability_check: open side shows board stack and cable channel

output.proposal: open side service windows aligned to board ladder
verification: inspect board slot alignment through window

input.existing_structure: tiny separate labels glued to panels

reasoning.rule: engraved labels remove adhesive steps
reasoning.serviceability_check: labels visible after cleaning

output.proposal: engrave labels directly into panels

input.constraint: removable panels must not require force

reasoning.rule: service interfaces need explicit clearance
reasoning.serviceability_check: panel removal after print

output.proposal: 0.25 mm panel slide clearance and deburr note

input.existing_structure: single rail-frame spine with no split line
input.constraint: ladder should insert after frame print

reasoning.rule: integrated frame needs a clear internal insertion route
reasoning.serviceability_check: ladder inserts through rear datum grooves

output.proposal: rear datum grooves for board ladder insertion

input.existing_structure: hinge dummy shares screws with service panel

reasoning.rule: fragile external parts should not share service panel fasteners
reasoning.serviceability_check: hinge removed without panel removal

output.proposal: external hinge boss on frame separate from service panel screws

reasoning.rule: engraved datum arrows improve assembly without extra parts
reasoning.serviceability_check: datum marks visible before panels installed

output.proposal: engrave +Z and service-side datum arrows

input.existing_structure: board dummy and cable guide merged into closed solid

reasoning.rule: do not hide educational/service features inside closed solids
reasoning.serviceability_check: cable channel must remain open

output.proposal: separate visible cable channel from board dummy body
verification: view cable path from side opening

input.problem: mockup is handled often and edges chip

reasoning.rule: handled edges need chamfer/fillet without hiding datum ribs
reasoning.serviceability_check: datum rib faces remain measurable

output.proposal: small chamfer on service edges and 1 mm fillet on handled corners

input.problem: looks clean but no assembly learning value

reasoning.rule: educational mockup must expose assembly sequence
reasoning.serviceability_check: no visible part roles in one-piece shell

output.proposal: use four redesigned groups: frame spine, service panels, board ladder, hinge dummies
verification: explain assembly sequence from visible parts

input.existing_structure: separate panel screws at every corner
input.constraint: mockup still needs repeatable panel retention

reasoning.rule: keep enough screws for repeatability but reduce redundant hardware
reasoning.serviceability_check: two panels retained by accessible bosses

output.proposal: eight accessible service-panel bosses instead of all-panel screws
